summary: Quick View Modal Share Buttons Testing - All tests PASSED. Verified WhatsApp share button and Copy Link button are visible and styled correctly on Blog, Projects, and Solutions Quick View modals. Both buttons have correct data-testid attributes, proper styling, and flex-1 equal-width layout.
critical_code_review_comments: Share buttons implementation is clean and reusable across all pages using shared QuickViewModal component
WhatsApp button correctly uses #25D366 green color (brand color) with rgba transparency for background
Copy Link uses navigator.clipboard.writeText() with proper try/catch fallback for older browsers
2-second timeout for 'Copied!' state is implemented correctly using useState + setTimeout
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quick View share buttons fully functional on all three pages (Blog, Projects, Solutions). WhatsApp button uses window.open() with wa.me/?text={encoded title + URL}. Copy Link button uses navigator.clipboard.writeText() and shows 'Copied!' with Check icon for 2 seconds. Note: 'Copied!' feedback not testable in headless browser due to clipboard API permissions, but code implementation is correct.

Blog Quick View - Copy Link button visible
Blog Quick View - View Full Details CTA below share buttons

tests_executed.test: Share buttons flex-1 equal width layout
tests_executed.notes: Both buttons have flex: 1 1 0% inside flex container
Button uses onClick={handleWhatsAppShare} which opens wa.me with encoded text
State management correct: setCopied(true) then setTimeout(() => setCopied(false), 2000)

manual_verification_notes: Copy Link 'Copied!' feedback requires manual verification in a real browser due to clipboard API permissions not available in headless testing environment. The code implementation is correct.
